name: sw-pascal
description: Pascal compiler targeting P-code VM (p24p), plus runtime library
notes: Pascal compiler is p24p.s (COR24 assembly, runs on emulator). Not a host binary. Artifacts are .s and .spc files copied directly. Commit pin is pre-issues-8-12; artifacts include fixes from working tree (issues #8 MAX_SYMBOLS, #9 arrays-in-records, #10 pointer-return-types, #11 MAX_PROCS, #12 INPUT_BUF_SIZE). Update commit pin when upstream commits these fixes.
